title: tokio broadcast channel infrastructure for streaming
description: Implement the internal broadcast channel system that routes events to streaming subscribers. Channels are keyed by type and optionally account_id or hashtag. Types: user:{account_id}, public, public:local, hashtag:{tag}, direct:{account_id}. Events are emitted at post write, post delete, notification creation, and post edit. The channel infrastructure must be set up before SSE and WebSocket handlers can route to it.
design: tokio::sync::broadcast::channel per channel key. Channel capacity: 256 (configurable). Store channels in a DashMap<ChannelKey, Sender<StreamEvent>> in Arc on AppState. ChannelKey enum: Public, PublicLocal, User(i64), Hashtag(String), Direct(i64). StreamEvent: {event_type, payload_json}.
acceptance_criteria: Posting a status emits an update event on the public channel and user channel for the author's followers; deleting a status emits a delete event; creating a notification emits a notification event on the user channel; hashtag posts emit on the correct hashtag channel
